EmailTemplate.name: Notify Missiing UR
EmailTemplate.subject: Last utilization report not found for {!leaseworks__Lease__c.leaseworks__Operator_New__r.name} , {!leaseworks__Lease__c.Name} .
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear user,
Please be informed that the last utilization report for {!leaseworks__Lease__c.leaseworks__Operator_New__r.name} , {!leaseworks__Lease__c.Name} has not been received timely. Please take the necessary action to follow up with the Operator.
Thanks.
